data.title: JMMD 8 in 1 Tricycle Stroller with Push Handle, Foldable Trike with 360° Swivel Seat, Reclining Backrest, All-Terrain Wheels,

features: GROWS WITH YOUR CHILD — FROM 6 MONTHS TO 5 YEARS: Designed to grow alongside your child
JMMD 8-in-1 tricycle stroller supports every stage from 6 months to 5 years. Easily converts from parent-push stroller mode to toddler trike
steering trike
learn-to-ride trike and classic trike—one smart investment that replaces multiple toddler vehicles.
FOLDABLE & TRAVEL-FRIENDLY — PERFECT FOR APARTMENTS: The toddler stroller folds down quickly for compact storage and fits easily in a standard car trunk
making it ideal for apartment living
road trips
and everyday outings. Store it neatly when not in use—no bulky gear taking over your space.
SAFE
STURDY & BUILT TO LAST: Built with a reinforced steel frame (supports up to 55 lbs) for long-term durability and stability
this push stroller tricycle is designed to safely support your child through every growth stage. Features a 3-point safety harness
detachable safety bar
rear dual brakes
and is ASTM F963 & CPSIA certified
giving parents confidence at every stage.
COMFORTABLE RIDE — INDOORS & OUTDOORS: Designed as a versatile stroller bike for toddler
the 360° swivel seat with lockable
multi-position recline keeps younger babies comfortable while allowing interaction as they grow. Equipped with maintenance-free EVA all-terrain wheels that roll smoothly on sidewalks
parks
and rough surfaces—no inflation needed. Includes an adjustable canopy
storage basket
cup holder
and parent pockets for everyday convenience.
TOOL-FREE SETUP IN ABOUT 5 MINUTES — ONE-PERSON FRIENDLY: No tools
no frustration. The JMMD toddler tricycle is mostly pre-assembled and can be set up in about 5 minutes by one person
making it ideal for busy parents who want to spend time with their child—not with instructions.
